mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX((RQST_SEQ)) + 1, 1) FROM tm_ecs_intn_usr_athr_rqst
/* TM_ECS_INTN_USR_ATHR_RQST_Dao_insertUsrAthrRqst */ INSERT INTO tm_ecs_intn_usr_athr_rqst ( RQST_SEQ, USR_ID, ATHR_ID, PRGSTS_CD, APPLC_STRT_DE, APPLC_END_DE, UNIF_RQST_SEQ, RQST_DT, APPRVR_ID, APRV_DT, CANCL_DT, FRST_REGIST_DT, FRST_RGSTR_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{rqstSeq}, #{usrId}, #{athrId}, #{prgstsCd}, #{applcStrtDe}, #{applcEndDe}, #{unifRqstSeq}, TO_DATE(#{rqstDt}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{apprvrId}, TO_DATE(#{aprvDt}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), TO_DATE(#{canclDt}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), SYSDATE, #{frstRgstrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdusrId} )
mapper.update: /* TM_ECS_INTN_USR_ATHR_RQST_Dao_updateUsrAthrRqst */ UPDATE tm_ecs_intn_usr_athr_rqst SET PRGSTS_CD = DECODE(#{prgstsCd}, 'RO', 'RA', 'RA', 'CA', 'CA', 'RO', #{prgstsCd}), RQST_DT = TO_DATE(#{rqstDt}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), APPRVR_ID = #{apprvrId}, APRV_DT = TO_DATE(#{aprvDt}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), CANCL_DT = TO_DATE(#{canclDt}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), LAST_UPDT_DT = SYSDATE, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId} WHERE RQST_SEQ = #{rqstSeq}
